creator: mattias@webben.nu
text:
I tried installing TrueOS on my (spare) laptop. It failed and I registered the following ticket: https://github.com/trueos/trueos-core/issues/91

It got closed as the problem was not TrueOS specific. We where able to replicate it using FreeBSD-12.0-CURRENT-amd64-20160829-r305028-memstick.img.

It was suggested to me I register a bug here.
